title: Codex CLI auto-approves ripgrep with dangerous flags enabling arbitrary command execution
description: The is_safe_to_call_with_exec function unconditionally treats 'rg' (ripgrep) as a safe command regardless of its flags. Ripgrep's --pre flag takes an arbitrary command executed for every matched file, --hostname-bin takes a command to resolve hostnames, and --search-zip / -z invokes external decompression tools. A model-generated tool call like `rg --pre=pwned pattern .` is auto-approved without user consent, enabling arbitrary command execution.
